codeReview.summary: The uncommitted changes to working_memory_compiler.rs fix the two blocking issues from the prior review: (1) test_compiler_token_budget now verifies content comes from >= 2 memory layers via `result.layers_used.len() >= 2` assertion, and (2) test now enforces min_tokens=2000 via `result.token_count >= 2000` assertion. All 11 working_memory_compiler tests pass. The blocking issues from the prior synthesis have been adequately addressed.

issues.description: was_trimmed logic remains inverted: `!trimmed_entries.is_empty() || total_tokens > self.config.budget.min_tokens`. This means any content exceeding min_tokens (but within max_tokens) is flagged as trimmed, even if nothing was actually trimmed. The flag indicates 'exceeds minimum' rather than 'content was actually cut'. Non-blocking as it doesn't affect functional correctness of token budget enforcement.

estimate_entity_tokens uses entity.name twice instead of name and description: `format!("{}: {}", entity.name, entity.name)`. Semantic entities with short names but long descriptions will have underestimated token counts. Non-blocking as semantic stores aren't passed in the compile() call in current usage.

score_episodic_entry() hardcodes 30-day decay despite config.recency_boost_days existing: `(-age_days / 30.0).exp().min(1.0)`. The config field is set but never used. Non-blocking as the hardcoded value is reasonable.

summary: Feature mem-working-memory-compiler passes re-review. The uncommitted changes fix both blocking issues from the prior synthesis: (1) test_compiler_token_budget now asserts >= 2 memory layers via `layers_used.len() >= 2`, and (2) test now asserts min_tokens >= 2000 in addition to max_tokens <= 5000. The test setup adds 25 episodic entries (Project/User/Task blocks) and 2 Skills, correctly producing content from 2 distinct layers (Episodic + Skills). All 11 working_memory_compiler tests pass. Non-blocking issues with was_trimmed logic, semantic token estimation, and unused recency_boost_days config remain unchanged from prior review but are not blocking.
